labs.title: From Loop to RSI: Sovereign Invention Governance Lab
labs.purpose: Shows how the GoalOS proof loop expands into deterministic invention governance for RSI-scale systems.
labs.proofLoop: Proof loop → deterministic invention OS → mechanical gates → Move-37 dossier → council-bounded promotion.
labs.bestFor: Executives, AI governance leaders, blockchain founders, DAO councils, auditors, national-scale strategy teams, and frontier AI governance programs.
